author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
dharmapathe thāki’ kara jīvana jāpana, bhāi
harināma kara sadā (ore o bhāi)
hari vinā bandhu nāi

je⋅kona vyavasā dhari’,
jīvana nirvāha kari’,
bala mukhe ‘hari hari’,
eimātra bhikṣā cāi

gaurāṅgacaraṇe maja’,
anya⋅abhilāṣa tyaja,
vrajendranandane bhaja,
tabe baḍa sukha pāi

āmi cā̐da⋅bāula dāsa,
kari tava kṛpā⋅āśa,
jānāiyā abhilāṣa,
nityānanda⋅ājñā gāi
en_translation:
O brother, live your life on the path of righteousness. Always chant the Holy Name, for there is no friend other than Hari.

Whatever occupation you may adopt to sustain your life, chant "Hari! Hari!" with your mouth; this is all I beg of you.

Absorb yourself in the lotus feet of Gaurāṅga, give up all other desires, and worship the son of the King of Vraja; then you will find great happiness.

I, Cānd Bāul, hope for your mercy. Expressing my desire, I sing the command of Nityānanda.
